description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat black roof and a rectangular footprint, set on a concrete sidewalk base. The front facade features a double-door entry with glass panels, flanked by two windows with dark trim and a small air conditioning unit in one window. The side and rear facades have a simpler design, with evenly spaced windows and minimal ornamentation, while the left side is painted a light gray, contrasting with the exposed brick on the other sides. The house is bordered by a sidewalk, with fire hydrants and a trash bin visible at the corners, suggesting an urban neighborhood setting. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the entryway is slightly elevated with a few steps and a small overhang. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with subtle decorative trim around the windows and doors.
description: A two-story urban brick house with a flat black roof, symmetrical windows, and a double-door entry, set on a concrete sidewalk base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main double-door entry with glass panels, two windows with dark trim, a small air conditioning unit, and a trash bin to the left.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a light gray painted facade, a single window above the entry, and a fire hydrant at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays two windows with dark trim, a plain black door, and a fire hydrant on the right.
description_view_3: Right side view features two windows, a black door, a visible utility pipe, and a fire hydrant at the corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with glass panels, small overhang, steps, and minimal decorative trim
